videos.headline: Ethan Davis tightropes the sideline for a Tennessee TD
videos.description: Ethan Davis gathers the rock and keeps his feet in bounds on his way to a Volunteers touchdown.

videos.headline: DeSean Bishop scores his 2nd TD for Tennessee
videos.description: DeSean Bishop finds the end zone for a second time to give the Volunteers a 21-0 lead.

videos.headline: Tennessee go up 28-0 on Star Thomas' rushing TD

videos.headline: Heupel credits Aguilar for thriving as a teammate and QB at Tennessee
videos.description: Josh Heupel says he is happy to break the Vols' loosing streak in The Swamp and discusses what Joey Aguilar has done for this team.
